hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,os,subprocess,sys;p=os.environ.get('CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR') or os.getcwd();f=os.path.join(p,'Cargo.toml');import os.path as op;if op.isfile(f):  for cmd in (['cargo','fmt','--all'],['cargo','clippy','--fix','--allow-no-vcs','--','-A','warnings']):    r=subprocess.run(cmd,cwd=p,capture_output=True,text=True);    sys.stdout.write(r.stdout[-1000:]);    sys.stderr.write(r.stderr[-1000:])"

python3 -c "import json,sys,re; p=json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if re.search(r'(\.env(\.|$)|\.pem$|\.key$|\.p12$|secrets\.toml$|Cargo\.lock$|id_rsa$|id_ed25519$)', p) else 0)"
